calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted:
Plaintiff's unopposed motion is granted. The truth of all specified facts in plaintiff's first set of requests for admission shall be deemed admitted.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
